---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new scanner, language client, or capability
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Type

- [ ] New scanner integration (SAST / DAST / SCA / Secrets / IaC)
- [ ] New language client (Go / Rust / Java / Ruby / .NET / other)
- [ ] New MCP tool or option
- [ ] IDE integration improvement (VS Code / JetBrains / Neovim)
- [ ] Other

## What Tool or Capability

Name of the tool or feature you'd like to see added.

## Why

Why is this useful? What security gap does it fill that existing tools don't cover?

## Tool Details (for new scanner requests)

- **Tool name:**
- **Website / repo:**
- **License:** (must be open source or have a free tier)
- **JSON output support:** Yes / No
- **Install command:**
- **Languages / frameworks supported:**

## Alternatives Considered

Are there existing tools in the project that partially cover this? Why aren't they sufficient?

## Additional Context

Any other information, links, or examples.
